login.title: Sign in
login.validationError: Please enter your email and password

forgotPassword.title: Set or reset password
forgotPassword.subtitle: First time or forgot it — enter your email and we’ll send a link to choose a new password.
forgotPassword.successMessage: If an account exists for that address, we sent instructions.

resetPassword.title: Create New Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password for
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been reset successfully. You can now log in with your new password.
resetPassword.invalidTokenMessage: This password reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.

validationErrors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

errors.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
errors.rateLimitExceeded: Too many password reset requests. Please try again later.
errors.emailSendFailed: Failed to send reset email. Please try again or contact support.
errors.resetFailed: Failed to reset password. Please try again.
